data.title: IRGC Threatens Major US Companies in Middle East as Legitimate Targets
data.description: The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) has issued a warning that major U.S. companies operating in the Middle East will be considered legitimate targets starting April 1. According to NS3.AI, the IRGC specifically named firms such as Google, JPMorgan Chase, and Tesla. These companies are involved in sectors like cloud services, payments, and corporate treasury, which are integral to various parts of the digital asset industry.

data.title: Drift Faces $285 Million Crypto Exploit
data.description: Drift experienced a significant security breach on Wednesday, resulting in the theft of approximately $285 million in cryptocurrency. According to NS3.AI, the incident was flagged by several firms, including PeckShield. Blockchain data revealed that some of the stolen assets were converted into USDC.

data.title: Australia Integrates Crypto Service Providers into Financial Services Framework
data.description: Australia has officially incorporated crypto service providers into its financial services regulatory framework. According to NS3.AI, this marks the first time that such providers are included within the country's formal financial services regime. This regulatory shift represents a significant change for the crypto industry in Australia.

data.title: Bitcoin Traders Adopt Defensive Stance as Easter Approaches
data.description: Bitcoin traders are adopting a defensive approach as Easter nears, according to K33. Leveraged short Bitcoin ETFs have reached an exposure of 9,012 BTC. According to NS3.AI, Vetle Lunde highlighted that the 30-day average funding rates have remained negative for 32 consecutive days. Historically, the Easter period has been associated with reduced Bitcoin trading volume and volatility.

data.title: Platform Introduces Digital Asset Accounts Feature
data.description: A recent platform update has introduced a new feature known as Digital Asset Accounts, complementing the existing cash management tools. According to NS3.AI, this addition is now visible within the platform's interface, enhancing user experience by integrating digital asset management with traditional financial tools.

data.title: DEX Spot Trading Volume Hits Lowest Level Since September 2024
data.description: Decentralized exchange (DEX) spot trading volume dropped to $155 billion in March, reaching its lowest monthly level since September 2024. According to NS3.AI, this decline highlights a significant reduction in trading activity within the decentralized finance sector. The data, provided by Unfolded, suggests a shift in market dynamics as traders reassess their strategies amid changing market conditions.

data.title: SpaceX Plans Confidential IPO to Raise $75 Billion
data.description: SpaceX has reportedly filed confidentially for a U.S. initial public offering, aiming to raise up to $75 billion. According to NS3.AI, the offering is targeting a valuation exceeding $1.75 trillion following the xAI merger. The IPO is anticipated to launch in June.

data.title: BitMine Immersion Technologies Stock Rises 12% Amid Ethereum Holdings Increase
data.description: BitMine Immersion Technologies experienced a 12% increase in its stock price on March 31, closing at $19.78. According to NS3.AI, the company expanded its Ethereum holdings by adding 71,179 ETH last week, bringing its total to 4.73 million ETH.

data.title: Solana's ecosystem, Drift Protocol, suffered an attack, resulting in losses of at least $200 million.
data.description: A security incident occurred at Drift Protocol, a derivatives trading platform based on Solana, with on-chain data showing losses of at least $200 million, and some estimates approaching $270 million. The project team stated that they have detected abnormal activity and are investigating, advising users not to deposit funds into the protocol and emphasizing that "this is not an April Fool's joke." The attack involved multiple liquidity pools, including JLP Delta Neutral, SOL Super Staking, and BTC Super Staking. A single transfer of approximately 41.7 million JLP tokens was worth about $155 million. Additionally, assets such as SOL, USDC, cbBTC, and wBTC were also transferred out. According to statistics, this incident may be one of the largest DeFi attacks in the Solana ecosystem since the Wormhole bridge exploit.

data.title: Bitcoin Transfer to Cumberland DRW Observed
data.description: A recent transaction involving Bitcoin has been reported. According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham indicates that at 02:36, 89 BTC were transferred from an anonymous address, beginning with 168Bve, to Cumberland DRW.

data.title: Morgan Stanley's Spot Bitcoin ETF Awaits SEC Approval for April Launch
data.description: Morgan Stanley has submitted an amended S-1 filing for its branded spot Bitcoin ETF, which is poised for a potential listing on April 8, pending final approval from the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). According to NS3.AI, the ETF is expected to trade under the ticker BITA, as noted by James Seyffart. The approval of this ETF could mark a significant development in the cryptocurrency market, offering investors a new avenue for exposure to Bitcoin.

data.title: Cryptocurrency's Role in National Strategies of North Korea, Russia, and Iran by 2025
data.description: Cryptocurrency is anticipated to play a significant role in the national strategies of North Korea, Russia, and Iran by 2025. According to NS3.AI, Chainalysis has highlighted the increasing importance of digital currencies in these countries' strategic plans. The firm has called for a more proactive approach to identifying and understanding the tools and methods these nations might employ in leveraging cryptocurrency for their national interests.

data.title: Drift Investigates Unusual Activity on Solana-Based DeFi Protocol
data.description: Drift has announced an investigation into unusual activity on its Solana-based decentralized finance (DeFi) protocol. According to NS3.AI, the platform has advised users against depositing funds during this period. Drift emphasized that this warning is not an April Fools joke, underscoring the seriousness of the situation.

data.title: Drift Protocol Experiences Significant Asset Outflow
data.description: More than $270 million in assets were transferred from Drift Protocol's main vault within minutes, reducing the address balance from $309 million to $41 million. According to NS3.AI, Arkham-labeled onchain data revealed that over 15 types of tokens were moved from the Solana-based perpetuals exchange's vault. DefiLlama reported Drift's total value locked (TVL) at approximately $550 million when these transfers were identified. As of the time of writing, Drift had not released a public statement, and security researchers had yet to confirm any exploit.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Warns of Potential Suspension of Ukraine Weapons Support
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has issued a warning regarding the suspension of weapons support to Ukraine. According to NS3.AI, Trump stated that the suspension could occur if European countries fail to join a U.S.-led coalition aimed at securing shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. This warning was reported by the Financial Times.

data.title: Berkshire Hathaway Invests $17 Billion in US Treasury Bills Amid Cash Reserves Growth
data.description: Berkshire Hathaway has made a significant investment in US Treasury bills, purchasing approximately $17 billion at the latest auction. According to NS3.AI, the firm concluded 2025 with cash and equivalents totaling around $373 billion. Meanwhile, Bitcoin's 20-week rolling correlation with the Nasdaq stood at 0.47 as of Wednesday, indicating a moderate relationship between the cryptocurrency and the stock market.

data.title: Galaxy Digital Reports Minor Security Breach in Development Workspace
data.description: Galaxy Digital has reported a security breach involving unauthorized access to one of its isolated development workspaces. According to NS3.AI, the company confirmed that the financial impact of the breach was minimal, with losses amounting to less than $10,000. Galaxy Digital assured that the compromised environment was not linked to any production systems, trading platforms, or client accounts, thereby minimizing potential risks to its operations and clients.

data.title: EDX Markets Seeks National Trust Bank Charter for Crypto Expansion
data.description: EDX Markets has submitted an application for a national trust bank charter with the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency, aiming to enhance its crypto custody and settlement services under federal regulation. According to NS3.AI, the application was made public on April 1. If granted, the charter would enable EDX Markets to offer additional services such as custody, asset management, and principal trading, complementing its current order-matching platform.

data.title: Bank of Canada Faces Dilemma in Balancing CPI Control and Economic Growth
data.description: According to Jin10, the Bank of Canada is grappling with a challenging situation as it attempts to manage consumer price index (CPI) inflation while also supporting economic growth. The recent meeting minutes reveal that officials are encountering conflicts in achieving these dual objectives. The central bank is under pressure to find a balance between curbing inflation and fostering an environment conducive to economic expansion. This situation highlights the complexities faced by policymakers in navigating the current economic landscape.

data.title: Bank of Canada: Economic Growth Faces Downside Risks Amid Oil Price Surge
data.description: The Bank of Canada has released its meeting minutes, highlighting concerns over short-term economic growth facing downside risks. According to Jin10, the committee noted that the recent surge in oil prices poses an additional upward risk to inflation. The central bank's assessment reflects ongoing challenges in balancing economic stability with inflationary pressures.
